title: Nexxen Bolsters Commercial Leadership with Enterprise and Data Hires
author: Genevieve Wheeler
description: Nexxen strengthens its commercial leadership by appointing Irina Katsnelson as SVP of Enterprise Sales and Oscar Rondon as VP of Data and Measurement Solutions to drive sales growth and enhance data-driven advertising technology capabilities.

title: Trump Says He Doesn't Need Scott Bessent's Advice To Fire Jerome Powell: 'I Know Better Than Anybody What's Good For The Market'
author: Namrata Sen
description: President Trump criticized a Wall Street Journal article claiming his Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent advised against firing Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell. Trump insisted he knows better about market dynamics and claims credit for current market performance.

title: Asia-Pacific $4.17 Bn Audiobooks Market Trends, Competitive Landscape, Forecasts and Opportunities, 2019-2023 & 2024-2029
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The Asia-Pacific audiobooks market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 12.59% from 2023 to 2029, driven by the increasing penetration of smartphones, the rise of subscription-based platforms, and the growing demand for regional language content.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Amazon's Audible platform is a leading global player in the audiobooks market, and its presence in the Asia-Pacific region is expected to contribute to the overall growth of the market.

title: Starboard Says Dual-Class Structure Hurts News Corp's Valuation, Calls For Elimination
author: Lekha Gupta
description: Starboard Value, News Corp's largest shareholder, opposes the company's dual-class share structure, stating it is unjustifiable and detrimental to shareholders. News Corp's board defends the structure, citing stability and long-term success, but Starboard believes it has exacerbated the company's valuation discount.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Starboard Value, News Corp's largest shareholder, believes the company's dual-class share structure is unjustifiable and detrimental to shareholders, and has exacerbated the company's valuation discount.

title: Is the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF a Millionaire Maker?
author: Neil Patel
description: The article discusses the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF (VOO) and its potential to make investors millionaires over the long term. It highlights the ETF's low expense ratio, historical performance, and the benefits of investing with a long-term horizon and dollar-cost averaging.
